description: Build output is chunked (ui.js, ui2-ui114) instead of preserveModules tree.
root_cause: vite.config.ts uses single output object with formats: ['es', 'cjs'] instead of array
resolution: RESOLVED — PR #7: rollupOptions.output changed to array with separate dirs
prevention: Use rollupOptions.output as array with separate dir per format
recurrence_check: verified — dist/es/ and dist/cjs/ now correct

description: CI never runs npm test. 772 tests invisible to pipeline.
root_cause: test job was never added to ci.yml
resolution: RESOLVED — PR #7: added Unit Tests job + quality gate in release.yml
prevention: test job in CI, quality gate in release

description: Default exports in 4+ components violating named-exports-only rule
resolution: RESOLVED — PR #7/#9: removed all default exports, added no-restricted-syntax ESLint rule
prevention: ESLint no-default-export rule enforced on src/**/*.{ts,tsx}

root_cause: Convention not enforced at lint level
resolution: RESOLVED — PR #7: replaced with color.adjust() from sass:color
prevention: Documented in project-conventions.md and expertise pack

description: CLAUDE.md tokens out of sync with tokens.scss
root_cause: tokens.scss was modified without updating CLAUDE.md
resolution: RESOLVED — PR #7: synced all token values, names, and scales
prevention: Source of truth note added to CLAUDE.md header

description: ESLint no-default-export rule caught story files which legitimately use export default meta
root_cause: Rule scope included **/*.stories.tsx files which need default exports for Storybook meta
resolution: Added ignores: ['**/*.stories.*'] to the ESLint rule config
prevention: Always scope ESLint rules to exclude story files when adding no-default-export
recurrence_check: verified — lint passes on all story files

description: 6 tests failed due to stale default imports after default export removal
root_cause: Test files imported components using default import syntax (import Component from './Component') but components no longer had default exports
resolution: Updated test imports to named imports (import { Component } from './Component')
prevention: When removing default exports, always grep test files for default import patterns and update them
recurrence_check: verified — 0 default imports in test files

description: ProductImageGallery test failed: alt text changed from 'Product image N of M' to 'Product N' after a11y fix
root_cause: a11y fix changed alt text pattern but agent did not update corresponding test assertions
resolution: Updated test to assert new alt text pattern
prevention: Include test verification step in a11y fix prompts: after changing any user-facing text, grep tests for the old text
recurrence_check: verified — test passes with new alt text

description: Desktop components placed in wrong Storybook sidebar sections, mixing with mobile components
root_cause: Story meta title not set correctly. Agents used title: '{Category}/{ComponentName}' instead of title: '{Category} (Desktop)/{ComponentName}'
resolution: RESOLVED — Storybook Title Convention table added to CLAUDE.md. critical-rules.md created with convention.
prevention: Every Desktop component story MUST use title: '{Category} (Desktop)/{ComponentName}'. Added to CLAUDE.md and critical-rules.md.
recurrence_check: 2026-03-28 — verify next Desktop component follows convention

description: DesktopHeaderAliExpress created with plain form+button instead of reusing DesktopSearchAutocomplete+MegaMenu
root_cause: No pre-implementation reuse scan. Agent didn't read existing components before creating new ones.
resolution: RESOLVED — Component Reuse Map added to CLAUDE.md. critical-rules.md includes reuse requirements. MegaMenu got triggerLabel/triggerIcon props. DesktopSearchAutocomplete got submitLabel prop.
prevention: Component Reuse Map in CLAUDE.md + critical-rules.md. Before ANY component creation: check barrel exports + reuse map.
recurrence_check: 2026-03-28 — verify next component reuses where appropriate

description: Debate for feature tasks modification was ADOPTED after session s3 but only enforced in 1 of 5 subsequent feature sessions (20%)
root_cause: ADOPTED status does not guarantee enforcement. The orchestrator skips debate under time pressure or when tasks seem straightforward. No automated gate prevents skipping.
resolution: Updated protocol-modifications.md with enforcement tracking. Added antipattern #20.
prevention: Orchestrator MUST log debate_rounds > 0 for all feature/architecture sessions. If debate is skipped, log explicit justification in metrics.jsonl. Zero-justification skips = protocol violation.
recurrence_check: pending — next feature session must enforce

description: Agent audited 4 out of 150+ components when owner asked to audit all. Owner said 'абсолютно все' and agent only checked the 4 components it had recently modified.
root_cause: Agent focused on own recent changes instead of interpreting 'all' literally. No checklist created to track progress through the full component library.
resolution: Owner flagged the gap. Agent admitted honestly it only did 4. Full audit still pending.
prevention: When owner says 'все компоненты' or 'абсолютно все' or 'audit all': (1) list every component directory, (2) create a checklist, (3) track progress, (4) do not mark complete until every single one is checked. Partial audits MUST be explicitly flagged with remaining count.
recurrence_check: pending — next audit request must cover 100% of components

description: Created component named DesktopHeaderAliExpress with hardcoded Russian text for an open-source npm library.
root_cause: No rule against competitor brand names in component exports. Agent treated the reference design (AliExpress) as the component name.
resolution: Renamed to DesktopHeaderMarketplace with labels prop for i18n neutrality.
prevention: Component names exported via npm/GitHub must be brand-neutral. Competitor names (AliExpress, Ozon, Uzum, Taobao, 1688) are acceptable as design REFERENCES in comments/docs but never in: component names, file paths, CSS classes, or exported identifiers.
recurrence_check: 2026-03-28 — verify next component creation uses brand-neutral naming
